     The Numbers Business Report

Moonfall (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,060,660Details
International Box Office $39,992,535
Worldwide Box Office $59,053,195
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,436,446
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,836,569
Total $3,273,015
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit around Earth and sends it hurtling on a collision course with life as we know it. With mere weeks before impact and the world on the brink of annihilation, NASA executive and former astronaut Jo Fowler is convinced she has the key to saving us all—but only one astronaut from her past, Brian Harper, and conspiracy theorist K.C. Houseman, believe her. These unlikely heroes will mount an impossible last-ditch mission into space, leaving behind everyone they love, only to find out that our Moon is not what we think it is.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,868,997 (51.8% of total gross)
Legs:1.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,446 opening theaters/3,446 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,649,143

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 4th, 2022 (Wide) by Lionsgate
February 4th, 2022 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: February 3rd, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
February 3rd, 2022 (Wide) (New Zealand)
February 3rd, 2022 (Wide) (Mexico)
February 3rd, 2022 (Wide) (Portugal)
February 3rd, 2022 (Wide), released as Падение Луны (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: March 31st, 2022 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, disaster action, strong language, and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2714 (cert #53243), 1/12/2022)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Plot point: Disaster
Social setting: End of the World
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Centropolis Entertainment, Street Entertainment , Lionsgate, Huayi Brothers International, Huayi Tencent Entertainment Company, AGC
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit around Earth and sends it hurtling on a collision course with life as we know it. With mere weeks before impact and the world on the brink of annihilation, NASA executive and former astronaut Jo Fowler is convinced she has the key to saving us all—but only one astronaut from her past, Brian Harper, and conspiracy theorist K.C. Houseman, believe her. These unlikely heroes will mount an impossible last-ditch mission into space, leaving behind everyone they love, only to find out that our Moon is not what we think it is.
